details.test: Task 1: Two different pints priced at 7 or less
Task 2: Custom sundae 2 scoops & 3 non-nut toppings
Task 3: 25 digital gift card via email for today
Task 4: Low-calorie gluten-free single scoop cone for pickup tomorrow at 3 PM
Task 5: Join loyalty program with chocolate preference and email/SMS opt-in
Task 6: Kids birthday catering for 12 guests under 120 two weeks from today
Task 7: Three single scoops 4+ with SWEET10 and pickup today
Task 8: Downtown Saturday hours and allergy contact message
Task 9: Double scoop of highest-rated flavor under 6 per scoop
